mapper.select: SELECT * FROM automations WHERE board_id = CAST(#{boardId} AS UUID) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM automations WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
mapper.insert:
SELECT uuid_generate_v4()
INSERT INTO automations ( id, board_id, name, is_active, trigger_config, condition_config, action_config, created_by ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS UUID), CAST(#{boardId} AS UUID), #{name}, #{isActive}, CAST(#{triggerConfig} AS JSONB), CAST(#{conditionConfig} AS JSONB), CAST(#{actionConfig} AS JSONB), CAST(#{createdBy} AS UUID) )
mapper.update: UPDATE automations SET name = #{name}, is_active = #{isActive}, trigger_config = CAST(#{triggerConfig} AS JSONB), condition_config = CAST(#{conditionConfig} AS JSONB), action_config = CAST(#{actionConfig} AS JSONB), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
UPDATE automations SET run_count = run_count + 1, last_run_at = NOW() WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM automations WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS UUID)
